title: Brazilian-Style Fluffy Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and comforting Brazilian-inspired rice bowl dish, topped with fluffy rice and a side of savory soup.

ingredients.name: brazilian seasoning
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, paprika, and oregano

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the brazilian seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the floral rice and stir to coat with the oil and seasoning.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is fluffy.
While the rice is cooking, heat the fluffy soup in a separate saucepan over low heat.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
To assemble the bowls, divide the cooked rice among four bowls.
Top each bowl with a scoop of the heated soup.
